title: OptiVisual
description: The modpack consists of mods for optimization, convenience, and also there are mods that add nice visualss
body:
# For what?
If you download a lot of mods in order for minecraft to be pretty enough and to be convenient,
you don't have to waste your time! Just download this modpack. It already has everything in it.
## What the modpack adds
In modpack a bunch of useful mods, some make minecraft more lively, some add a visual component, There is a mod for sounds, as well as optimization mods. With this modpak your game in Minecraft will change, and will become many times more pleasant, and more comfortable
